from_session: MPI-306 Phase 2 — Head Swap as the frame's proof, SHIPPED and user-verified; UI polish round done

session.name: App carousel frame — PHASES 1+2 SHIPPED; Phase 3 (hold-until-Apply) is next

goal.original: Design the portable app UI frame (MPI-306), then build it.
goal.summary: Phases 1 and 2 are BUILT and USER-VERIFIED. Head Swap RUNS LOCALLY end-to-end — the user generated a real head swap, confirmed Reuse works, and confirmed result persistence works. Five commits this session: b25bea21 (Phase 2), d5ee8601 (the 'cannot run' correction), 9d20e384 (zoom/pan + blur), e2b1780b (addressable slots + drag/pan fixes), f288beae (result persistence), a800ded1 (frame spans the column). Next session runs PHASE 3 — hold-until-Apply, the run-path change.

completed: Mock-up phase: three mock-ups, C2 approved as THE design.
PHASE 1 (steps 1-6): the portable carousel frame. Committed 12a06b51 + 9e6c4cae.

PHASE 2 (step 7): Head Swap declares two box steps + slot labels + MpiAppHeadSwap tier radio; boxes reach Input_Box / Input_Box_2 as top-left source pixels. Committed b25bea21. USER-VERIFIED by a real local generation.

UI polish (all user-reported, all committed): zoom/pan on the result pane; latent blur 9px->2px; addressable media slots; drag-ghost + sticky-pan fixes; result persistence across step navigation; result frame spans the column from the divider.
pending: PHASE 3 — hold-until-Apply (plan step 8). THIS IS THE NEXT ACTION.
User: head-swap LoRA fp32-vs-fp16 A/B, then R2 upload (NOT authorised). Blocks RunPod + other machines ONLY.
User: supply the real step-0 example image for Head Swap (still the placeholder `sdxl-real-05.webp`).
RunPod validation of Head Swap (cannot happen until the LoRA is on R2).

completed: docs/playbooks/add-app/existing-apps/head-swap.md — status table CORRECTED (it runs locally; R2 gates remote + other machines only) + the shipped UI recorded.
docs/playbooks/add-app/ui/carousel-frame.md — status BUILT; § Steps are DATA now records where role->graph-param mapping lives (the APP, via getInputs({stepValues})).
js/data/modelConstants/loraDeps.js — comment corrected: 'not uploaded' is not 'not runnable'.
pending: A memory entry for the mpi_box contract — now genuinely earned (a real generation proved it end-to-end). Deferred four times; write it.
A memory entry for the SLOT model: media slots are ADDRESSABLE by index, never a packed list. The packed model silently swapped Head Swap's target and reference. Worth a feedback/project memory.
UNCARDED: `--lib-bg` is declared locally in MpiAppLibrary.css, MpiModelManager.css and MpiBaseApp.css. Deliberate; card it if a fourth surface wants it.
UNCARDED: MpiVideoViewer.enterCropMode(initialRect) still un-retested after the cropTool root fix.

next_action.description: Implement PHASE 3 of .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-306/plan.md — hold-until-Apply. TODAY: submitAppGeneration enqueues with scope:'gallery' + a placeholderGroup (js/services/appService.js ~104-108), so a gallery card appears at ENQUEUE time, before the run finishes, and Apply is INERT (MpiBaseApp._apply just flips the note + status). Phase 3 makes the result live IN-APP until Apply commits it. Verify: generating creates NO gallery card; Apply commits exactly one; closing with an unapplied result leaves none; the project JSON is genuinely untouched pre-Apply. TWO DECISIONS ARE ALREADY MADE BY THE USER (2026-07-18): (1) Apply stays HIDDEN when there is no result — do NOT render it disabled; (2) Reuse only working AFTER Apply is correct and expected. Files still land on disk regardless — orphans are the existing .preview-assets + Cleanup GC path's job (MPI-277/227), NOT a new mechanism. Pending results live in component state and do NOT survive closing the app (the _lastResults var added this session is exactly that scope). Head Swap RUNS LOCALLY, so Phase 3 CAN and MUST be verified by generating.

key_decisions: HEAD SWAP RUNS LOCALLY. The long-standing 'the graph 404s on its LoRA' claim was WRONG and is now corrected in the docs. Node 109 loads bfs_head_v5_2511_merged_version_rank_32_fp32.safetensors, present in G:\CubricModels\loras\qwen\ (1,206,402,600 bytes; an fp16 rank-16 variant is there too). The missing R2 upload blocks RunPod (the Pod pulls from R2) and installs on OTHER machines — never a local run. A LOCAL failure is a REAL bug. Check the disk before declaring an app unrunnable.
APPLY STAYS HIDDEN with no result (user-decided this session, closing the Phase 1 open question). Do not render it disabled.
REUSE WORKING ONLY AFTER APPLY is correct and expected (user-confirmed this session).

MEDIA SLOTS ARE ADDRESSABLE BY INDEX, not a packed list. `items` is SPARSE — a hole is a legal empty slot, and an item's role is its SLOT's role, never its array position. The old packed model put an image dropped on slot 2 into slot 1, which for Head Swap made the reference image the target and ran the swap BACKWARDS, silently. Never splice; never repack.

The role -> graph-param mapping lives in the APP's controls component, via getInputs({ stepValues }). The frame collects `{[role]: value}` and must never learn what a role means. Head Swap maps image1->box1 (mask) and image2->box2 (crop) in MpiAppHeadSwap.js.
Box coords pass through UNCONVERTED: MpiStepBox reports absolute top-left SOURCE pixels already clamped; only w/h -> width/height is renamed at the injection site. Never add arithmetic there.
Tier cost labels are MEASURED RELATIVE ratios (baseline / ~25% / ~13% of time), never absolute seconds.

The result pane uses the SHARED ViewManager pan/zoom model (as History / MpiVideoViewer / MpiMaskedImagePreview). The view RESETS on every new image deliberately — a latent is often a localized crop while the final is a different resolution.
Result frame spans the right column from the divider (no left border — the divider IS its edge), height 60vh clamped 320-620px. Height is FIXED, not auto: the zoom viewport needs a stable box.
Latent blur is 2px (was 9px) + the frost scanline. The scanline lives on the FRAME, not the transformed media layer, or it would zoom with the image.
constraints: DO NOT re-derive or re-litigate the design — docs/playbooks/add-app/ui/carousel-frame.md § The approved composition is settled and user-approved.
Phase 3 touches the RUN PATH. A UI regression and a data-path regression must not land in the same diff — this is why it was held back.
state.s_appInputs[appId] persists INPUTS across close/reopen. Pending RESULTS must NOT be persisted there.

Standing UI law: ComponentFactory.create (never modify js/components/factory.js), BEM, qs/qsa/gid + on/off from js/utils/dom.js, CSS vars from styles/01_base.css, icons from js/utils/icons.js, Events.on/emit with stored unsubs, a destroy() that cleans everything, register new CSS in js/shell/preloadStyles.js and document props in js/components/types.js.
State: never mutate sub-objects — replace the top-level key.
NO SEED UI, EVER. Head Swap is also a FIXED-PROMPT app: the graph has no Input_Positive/Input_Negative, both baked. Never build a prompt box for it.
Shared tree: commit by explicit pathspec, never `git add -A`. NEW files must be `git add`ed before `git commit --only` will accept them.
The user's app instance owns port 3000. Do NOT spawn a second one. Drive the RUNNING app.

Browser-mode automation: #app-shell carries `hide` (display:none) until a project is opened, and a headless profile usually has NO project — every element then measures 0x0. That is NOT a bug; unhide the shell to measure, and always assert REAL widths/heights.
Playwright: use waitUntil:'domcontentloaded', never 'networkidle' (the app holds SSE/WS open and it times out).

5 test files fail on this branch PRE-EXISTING (download-completion, optional-media-placeholder, output-prompt-capture, resolve-model-deps, runpod-remote-hardening). Confirm any failure against a stash before blaming your diff. There is no `npm test`; run tests/*.test.cjs individually.

resume_prompt: Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/7937cb4e-11cc-4567-930c-f1e245bbb2ee.json, then .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-306/plan.md and docs/playbooks/add-app/ui/carousel-frame.md § Results are not real until Apply. MPI-306 Phases 1 and 2 are SHIPPED and USER-VERIFIED: the portable carousel frame is live, Head Swap declares its two box steps + tier radio, and the user has generated a real head swap locally, confirmed Reuse, and confirmed result persistence. The design is SETTLED — do not re-derive it. Build PHASE 3 ONLY: hold-until-Apply. Today submitAppGeneration enqueues with scope:'gallery' + a placeholderGroup (js/services/appService.js ~104-108), so the gallery card appears at ENQUEUE time and Apply is inert; Phase 3 holds the result in-app until Apply commits it. Verify by GENERATING (Head Swap runs locally — the old 'LoRA 404s' claim was wrong and is corrected in the docs): generating must create NO gallery card, Apply must commit exactly one, closing with an unapplied result must leave none, and the project JSON must be untouched pre-Apply. Two decisions are already made and must NOT be reopened: Apply stays HIDDEN when there is no result (not disabled), and Reuse working only after Apply is correct. Files still land on disk regardless — orphans are the existing .preview-assets + Cleanup GC path's job (MPI-277/227), not a new mechanism. Pending results live in component state and must NOT be written to state.s_appInputs. Beware: media slot `items` is SPARSE and indexed BY SLOT (never splice or repack — the packed model silently swapped Head Swap's target and reference), and _lastResults holds the completed result so it survives step navigation. The user's app owns port 3000 — drive it, never spawn a second instance; in browser automation #app-shell is display:none until a project is opened, so unhide it and assert real geometry. 5 test files fail PRE-EXISTING on this branch; confirm against a stash before blaming your diff.
